subcodes.first_line: O Moses, what is that in thy right hand? Know thou, then, that God, blessed and exalted is He, according to His consummate wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و ما تلک بیمینک یا موسی فاعلم بان الله تبارک و تعالی بمقتضی حکمه البالغه
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @imagery in the Qur'an, @limits of language
